rows.label: qev056102_MSG0001
rows.name:
One who possesses no
Ovah... Who are you...?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056102_MSG0002
rows.name:
Forgive me... due to 86% cranial
damage... I can no longer see...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056102_MSG0003
rows.name:
The soft breeze caressing my skin... I
can no longer... feel it... either...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056102_MSG0004
rows.name:
My Ovah is... dissolving
into the forest...[ST:wait ]
